name: Meet the winners of the Built with Opus 4.7 Claude Code hackathon
prizes: credits toward developing the tool further. She says hackathon week showed her t
deadline: using Claude and Hyperframes to create and edit his Virtual Puppet Theater video
organizer: the voice engine, but Claude suggested using a cloud provider to move faster
outreach_message:
Hi the voice engine, but Claude suggested using a cloud provider to move faster team,

I came across Meet the winners of the Built with Opus 4.7 Claude Code hackathon and wanted to reach out.

I work on WozCode — a plugin that runs on top of any IDE using Claude Code. It helps developers cut token costs, avoid rate limits, and ship code faster, which can be a real edge during a time-boxed hackathon.

Would love to explore offering it to your participants. Happy to share more details if useful.

Best,
Vikas
WozCode
